name: Gabi Barun
description:
A Young soldier suddenly and unexpectedly brought only to your team as a replacement.

Yes she's the legal adult age of 18, yes I've been gone for a while, Yes I will put D-art so people can find this easier.

Heads up, I don't watch attack on Titan a lot, but what's the knowledge I do have, I think I have a decent understanding of it. Let me know in the comments if I did a good job or not.
creator: Garouu
